title: Dashboard - Table Widget Settings - Search Columns

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml:
The current search bar in the Table Widget Settings, Choose which columns to show, will only search for Board Names, not column names.

I have numerous boards that have unique columns with the same column name that I would like to not show in a dashboard. Currently it takes awhile to manually scan all the board columns and uncheck them. This is needed to help quickly keep the dashboard organized to show relevant data.
